title: Argquz Totem
body:
_**Argquz Totem**_ pack replaces Minecrafts ugly looking totem and makes it lot better!

This texture pack is **_cool_**, **_simplistic_** and fully **_vanilla-friendly._**

If you enjoy this pack please **_like_**, **_dowload_** and **_share!_**



**____________________________________________________________________________________________**


![What the totem looks in-game!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/614d45a4fa40d7bab0b1805689407af74a8d11d7.png)
